name: Cloud Cost Report — Weekly Summary via Claude AI

nodes.name: Weekly Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 08:00 UTC. Adjust triggerAtDay and triggerAtHour to match your team's timezone.

nodes.name: Set Report Window
nodes.notes: Computes ISO date strings for the 7-day window passed to Cost Explorer.

nodes.name: AWS Cost Explorer — Get Cost And Usage

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ TimePeriod: { Start: $('Set Report Window').first().json.reportWindow.start, End: $('Set Report Window').first().json.reportWindow.end }, Granularity: 'WEEKLY', GroupBy: [{ Type: 'DIMENSION', Key: 'SERVICE' }], Metrics: ['UnblendedCost', 'UsageQuantity'] }) }}

nodes.notes: Calls AWS Cost Explorer GetCostAndUsage. Requires SigV4 signing — use an AWS credential node or a pre-signed Authorization header stored in $vars.AWS_SIGV4_AUTH. For local testing, replace this node with a Set node containing sample cost data.

nodes.name: Parse and Compact Cost Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes Cost Explorer output into a compact payload for the AI narrative node. Includes realistic sample data for local testing without live AWS credentials.

nodes.name: Claude AI — Generate Cost Narrative

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', max_tokens: 1024, system: 'You are a FinOps analyst. Given raw cloud cost data, produce a concise weekly cost summary in Slack-friendly markdown. Include: total spend, top cost drivers, week-over-week change, and 2–3 actionable optimization recommendations. Keep it under 400 words. Be specific with dollar amounts and percentages.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate the weekly cloud cost report from this data: ' + JSON.stringify($json.costData) }] }) }}

nodes.notes: Calls Claude claude-3-5-haiku-20241022 directly via Anthropic API. Uses $vars.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — set this in n8n Variables. Haiku is used for cost efficiency; swap to claude-3-5-sonnet for richer analysis.

nodes.name: Gemini — Optimization Recommendations

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'You are a cloud cost optimization expert. Review this weekly cost data and provide exactly 3 specific, actionable FinOps recommendations. Format as a numbered list with estimated monthly savings for each. Data: ' + JSON.stringify($('Parse and Compact Cost Data').first().json.costData) }] }] }) }}

nodes.notes: Uses Gemini Flash (free tier available) for additional optimization reasoning. Runs in parallel with the Slack notification branch. Set $vars.GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY in n8n Variables.

nodes.name: Slack — Post Weekly Cost Report
nodes.notes: Posts the Claude-generated narrative to your FinOps/cloud-costs Slack channel. Set $vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_FINOPS or it defaults to #cloud-costs.

nodes.name: Slack — Post Gemini Recommendations
nodes.notes: Posts the Gemini optimization recommendations as a follow-up message in the same channel.

main.node: AWS Cost Explorer — Get Cost And Usage

meta.description: Weekly cloud cost report workflow. Pulls spend data from AWS Cost Explorer, sends the raw data to Claude (claude-3-5-haiku) for a Slack-friendly narrative, and runs Gemini Flash for parallel optimization recommendations. Both outputs are posted to a Slack channel. Includes realistic sample data for local testing without live AWS credentials.
meta.notes: Perplexity is NOT required for this workflow. Claude + Gemini handle all AI tasks. AWS Cost Explorer API calls require SigV4 authentication — for local testing, the Parse node uses sample data automatically.
